title: digitaria adscendens
intro: Digitaria adscendens, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass species native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria adscendens include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
